method: Mechanism ablations around Uformer full-token detached representation
key_result: Chosen a_repr_detach_full_tokens: acc 0.99001, good/medium/bad 0.98501/0.98910/0.99591, denoise_score 4.282. Highest backup c_repr: acc 0.99046. CE-backprop control kept acc but denoise collapsed to -3.12.
value: Explains why each mechanism is necessary: full tokens, Transformer blocks, U-shaped skips, local conv stem, and CE detach.
recommendation: Use a_repr_detach_full_tokens as thesis/mainline core; keep c_repr as backup and controls as proof.
